$comment: windows-icm: a Windows automation / coding ICM for C# (in-box csc, C# 5) and PowerShell. The KB is a growing library of references, patterns, recipes, scaffolds, and snippets. The oracle for code is the compiler/parser, wired as the csc_check and ps_parse tools and driven by the write_csharp / write_powershell generate-verify-repair flows.
name: windows-icm
domain: Windows automation and tooling with C# (in-box csc, C# 5) and PowerShell 5.1

tools.name: ask
tools.description: Answer a Windows/C#/PowerShell question from the knowledge base (references, patterns, recipes).

tools.name: csc_check
tools.description: Compile a C# file with the in-box csc at langversion 5 and report OK or the compiler diagnostics. The C# source is supplied on stdin.

tools.name: ps_parse
tools.description: Parse-check a PowerShell script (syntax only, no execution) and report OK or the parse errors. The script is supplied on stdin.

tools.name: csc_winforms
tools.description: Compile a complete WinForms C# program as a winexe (with the WinForms + Drawing references) at langversion 5 and report OK or the compiler diagnostics. The C# source is supplied on stdin.

code.description: a complete WinForms C# program with a [STAThread] Main

tools.name: write_csharp
tools.description: Generate C# 5 code grounded in the KB, compile it, and repair until it builds.

tools.name: write_grounded
tools.description: Generate C# 5 code grounded in EVERY relevant KB entry (multi-pick), compile it, and repair until it builds.

tools.name: write_winforms
tools.description: Generate a WinForms desktop GUI app, compile it as a winexe with the WinForms references, and repair until it builds.

tools.name: capture_snippet
tools.description: Capture a reusable code snippet as a ready-to-save snippet file (icm metadata block + code) for the snippets/ layer.

tools.name: write_powershell
tools.description: Generate PowerShell grounded in the KB, parse-check it, and repair until it parses.
